Package recoder.java

Interface ScopeDefiningElement

All Superinterfaces:
ModelElement, NonTerminalProgramElement, ProgramElement, SourceElement
All Known Subinterfaces:
TypeScope, VariableScope
All Known Implementing Classes:
AnnotationDeclaration, AnnotationPropertyDeclaration, Catch, CatchSVWrapper, Ccatch, CcatchSVWrapper, ClassDeclaration, CompilationUnit, ConstructorDeclaration, ContextStatementBlock, EnhancedFor, EnumClassDeclaration, EnumDeclaration, Exec, For, InterfaceDeclaration, MethodDeclaration, StatementBlock, Switch, TypeDeclaration, TypeParameterDeclaration
public interface ScopeDefiningElement extends NonTerminalProgramElement
The property of a non terminal program element to define a scope. Scopes should not be accessed from outside the SourceInfo service.

  • Method Details

    • isDefinedScope

      boolean isDefinedScope()
      Check if the scope has been set up.

    • setDefinedScope

      void setDefinedScope(boolean defined)
      Sets the scope to be defined or undefined. If set to defined, the scope cache becomes initialized. If set to undefined, the scope cache becomes erased.
